LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARTHA WALKER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 28, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 7, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT ALSO DOES NOT HAVE THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD THAT WAS LODGED ON DECEMBER 30, 2013. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MARTHA WALKER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF EXECUTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PREVIOUSLY ENTERED ARE SET ASIDE AND VACATED, AND THE WRIT OF EXECUTION (SHERIFF'S NO. 13411890) IS RECALLED. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE THE PROPOSED ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT MARTHA WALKER MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is a duplicate entry.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PATRICK HIU, TEL. NO. 538-3333 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARTHA WALKER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF EXECUTION is Granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment previously entered are set aside and vacated, and the writ of execution (Sheriff's No. 13411890) is recalled. Defendant shall file the proposed answer within 10 days of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARTHA WALKER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS Continued to January 28, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 7, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The Court also does not have the Administrative Record that was lodged on December 30, 2013. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
